title: Flava Car Air Freshener Turbo Can Spray - Billion (Pack of 1) Perfume Inspired Scent - Strong, Long Lasting Air Freshener Spray - Odour Eliminating Dry Mist Fragrance for Car Truck or Van - 400ml
features: POWER BURST - Transform any space with Flava air fresheners, delivering a powerful burst of fragrance that fills large areas quickly and effectively. Perfect for freshening up your home, car, or workspace.
ODOUR CONTROL - Combat unpleasant odours effortlessly with our spray cans. The fine, lingering fragrance works to neutralise odours for extended periods, ensuring a fresher, cleaner environment.
DRY MIST SPRAY - Unlike liquid air fresheners, Flava Turbo Cans feature an innovative dry mist formula that leaves no wet or sticky residue on surfaces, providing a mess-free experience every time.
VERSATILE USE - Designed for use in homes, offices, gyms, and even industrial settings, Flava air freshener cans are ideal for professional car valeters and a wide range of commercial spaces.
LONG LASTING - Maximise the fragrance's longevity by applying it to fabrics, perfect for those who want lasting freshness. Be sure to test a small area before full application for optimal results.
description: Product Description Flava Turbo Cans deliver a high volume blast of fragrance in the home or car. Turbo Cans are particularly suitable where there is a need to fill a large area quickly and effectively, leaving a fine lingering fragrance which can combat odours for long periods. Unlike typical liquid sprays, Turbo Can’s innovative dry mist spray leaves zero wet, sticky residue on surfaces. Flava Turbo Cans are also suitable for commercial and industrial use in shops, offices, factories, gyms and more. Also ideal for professional car valeters. Ingredients Petroleum Gases Liquified; Ethyl alcohol
